en_title: Resident Evil Veronica Is a Third-Person Game, Capcom Confirms
cn_title: 卡普空确认《生化危机 维罗妮卡 重制版》为第三人称
subtitle: 经典视角回归
opus_summary: 卡普空确认《生化危机 维罗妮卡 重制版》采用第三人称视角。制作人平林良章表示，游戏由《生化危机2》《生化危机4》重制版团队打造，将保留原版标志性元素。故事发生在《生化危机2》三个月后，克莱尔战斗能力合理进化。游戏预计2027年发售。

paragraphs.en: The teaser for Resident Evil Veronica at Summer Game Fest may well have been presented in first-person, but the game itself will be played in third-person, Capcom has confirmed.
paragraphs.cn: 卡普空确认，在夏日游戏节上公布的《生化危机 维罗妮卡 重制版》预告片虽然以第一人称视角呈现，但游戏本身将采用第三人称玩法。

paragraphs.en: Speaking at a Q&A session after the reveal attended by IGN, the remake’s producer, Yoshiaki Hirabayashi, confirmed that “this game will be a third-person game.”
paragraphs.cn: 在发布会后的问答环节中，IGN 现场参与了该环节，重制版制作人平林良章确认「这款游戏将是第三人称游戏」。

paragraphs.en: Seeing as the teaser told a story from a different perspective, and this year’s Resident Evil Requiem switches between the two styles, players might have thought that Veronica would follow a familiar path, with perhaps Claire and Chris’ sections doing something similar.
paragraphs.cn: 考虑到预告片以不同视角讲述故事，而今年的《生化危机：安魂曲》在两种视角间切换，玩家或许会以为《维罗妮卡》也会走类似路线，比如克莱尔和克里斯的部分采用不同视角。

paragraphs.en: It makes sense, though. The original Code Veronica is an action-heavy Resident Evil entry that introduced the likes of dual-wielding SMGs and being able to target multiple enemies at once into its combat repertoire. When asked if this reimagining will include the same mechanics, Hirabayashi explained that he was “not going to be able to get into too many details today.”
paragraphs.cn: 不过这也说得通。原版《代号：维罗妮卡》是一款动作性较强的《生化危机》作品，在战斗系统中引入了双持冲锋枪、同时瞄准多个敌人等要素。当被问及这款重制版是否会包含相同机制时，平林良章表示他「今天无法透露太多细节」。

paragraphs.en: “However, the team behind this remake is the same team that handled the Resident Evil 2 and Resident Evil 4 remakes,” he continued. “So if you looked at the past remakes that this team has created, you can probably sense a certain mindset that we have when we make a game, and that mindset includes preserving those iconic and key aspects of the title. So again, if you look at our work, you can probably get kind of a good sense of what kind of approach we're taking here, and maybe you can imagine what that might look like for this remake.”
paragraphs.cn: 「不过，这款重制版的开发团队与《生化危机2》和《生化危机4》重制版是同一批人，」他继续说道，「所以如果你看过这个团队过去的重制作品，大概能感受到我们做游戏时的一种理念，那就是保留那些标志性和关键的元素。所以，如果你看看我们的作品，大概就能很好地理解我们在这里采取的方法，也许你能想象出这款重制版会是什么样子。」

paragraphs.en: Veronica stars Claire Redfield as she begins the search for her missing brother, Chris. Having survived the horrors of Resident Evil 2, she’s thrust back into the action, albeit with more experience than she had prior to the horrors of Raccoon City. In regard to how much of an evolved version of Claire we’ll see in Veronica, and how far her combat skills have developed, Hirabayashi said the team is taking a realistic approach.
paragraphs.cn: 《维罗妮卡》的主角是克莱尔·雷德菲尔德，她开始寻找失踪的哥哥克里斯。在经历了《生化危机2》的恐怖之后，她再次投身行动，不过比起浣熊市噩梦之前，她拥有了更多经验。关于我们在《维罗妮卡》中会看到克莱尔进化到什么程度，以及她的战斗技能发展到何种地步，平林良章表示团队采取了现实主义的处理方式。

paragraphs.en: “So during Resident Evil 2, she was a university student,” the producer stated. “Veronica takes place about three months after the events of Resident Evil 2. So let's just think about how that progression or how much change happened in about three months. So again, three months is not a lot of time. Of course, she has had training from her brother, and of course, she survived the incident in Raccoon City, so she's not going to be the exact same character. But the portrayal of her and her style is going to be in alignment with that timeline and that history that we're looking at for Veronica.”
paragraphs.cn: 「在《生化危机2》中，她是一名大学生，」制作人说道，「《维罗妮卡》的故事发生在《生化危机2》事件大约三个月后。所以让我们想想，三个月内能有多少进步或变化。三个月时间并不长。当然，她接受过哥哥的训练，也经历了浣熊市事件并幸存下来，所以她不会是完全相同的角色。但她的形象和风格将与我们为《维罗妮卡》设定的时间线和历史保持一致。」

paragraphs.en: We’ll see just how much Resident Evil Veronica resembles the original when we finally get our hands on in 2027. Be sure to check out IGN's roundup of everything announced during Summer Game Fest 2026 to find out what else the video game industry has in store.
paragraphs.cn: 等到2027年我们真正上手时，就能知道《生化危机 维罗妮卡 重制版》与原版有多相似了。别忘了查看IGN整理的2026年夏日游戏节全部发布内容汇总，了解游戏行业还有哪些惊喜。

translated_terms.Resident Evil Veronica: 《生化危机 维罗妮卡 重制版》
